TestCase z17Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_a = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_a, t1.a, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.a = follow_case_a;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code: need at least 2 elements to perform sorting
    if (follow_case.n < 2) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Sort array in ascending order
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n - 1; ++i) {
        for (int j = 0; j < follow_case.n - i - 1; ++j) {
            if (follow_case.a[j] > follow_case.a[j + 1]) {
                double temp = follow_case.a[j];
                follow_case.a[j] = follow_case.a[j + 1];
                follow_case.a[j + 1] = temp;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
